CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Consolidated with Case No. 469791 Allstate Ins. Co. vs. Luxor Cab Co. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR# 7782. (212)

Off Calendar Jan-13-2009 Continued To Mar-10-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
